mapper.select: SELECT book_id, book_title, book_author, book_publisher, book_publication_date, book_isbn, book_description, book_price, book_image_url, book_sales_point, book_category FROM book WHERE book_title LIKE CONCAT ("%", #{query}, '%') OR ook_author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query}, '%')
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO book ( book_title, book_author, book_publisher, book_publication_date, book_isbn, book_description, book_price, book_image_url, book_sales_point, book_category ) VALUES ( #{bookTitle}, #{bookAuthor}, #{bookPublisher}, #{bookPublicationDate}, #{bookIsbn}, #{bookDescription}, #{bookPrice}, #{bookImageUrl}, #{bookSalesPoint}, #{bookCategory} )
